name: app.kraty.sdk
description: C# client SDK for the Kraty game-events platform. Targets the public /sdk/v1 surface: events, leaderboards, grants, crates, lobbies. Built on .NET Standard 2.1 for Unity 2022 LTS+ and any modern .NET runtime.

samples.description: MonoBehaviour panel that exercises every public SDK surface against your backend: drop on a GameObject, hit Play, click buttons. Use it to verify Editor + IL2CPP Player builds before each release.
